titlestmt.titleproper: Mariposa Education and Research Foundation records7300
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Andrea Hektor, Brenda Marston

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-27 23:23:28 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Mariposa Education and Research Foundation records
did.physdesc: Printed materials, office files, publications, 8mm film reels, audio reels, cassette tapes, photographs.
did.abstract: Mariposa's organizational records, plus some of the ephemera and audio-visual materials it collected.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Mariposa Education and Research Foundation was founded to educate the public and its leaders about human sexuality and to bridge the gap between the accurate information known to researchers and the sexual beliefs held by most other Americans. For its libraries, it collected periodicals and other publications, personal files, legal documents, notes, manuscripts, clippings, and films pertaining to all aspects of human sexuality, and to the gay and lesbian experience in particular.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Mariposa's organizational records, including mailings and minutes of meetings. Also educational materials Mariposa created for the public, including posters and brochures, plus some of the ephemera (for example magazines and photographs) and audio-visual materials it collected. Themes include birth control, gay and lesbian rights and legal issues, S/M lifestyle, and other aspects of human sexuality.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Distinct sub-collections are cataloged separately. For a list of these component collections, search the Library catalog under the title Mariposa Education and Research Foundation records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Mariposa Education and Research Foundation records, #7300. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Lesbian and Gay History Group of Toronto

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two film reels: Close Feelings and Hope Is Not A Method; Audiocassettes: "Sol Gordon, 10/19/1973, Owego", "Getting Together is Life Itself", Blur "Girls & Boys" single; Mini educational films on birth control.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Journal of Sex Education & Therapy, The Personnel and Guidance Journal, miscellaneous professional health magazines: The Female Patient, The International Journal of Psycho-Analysis, Society for Sex Therapy and Research Directory, etc.; miscellaneous mainstream magazines with GLBT related articles: Time, New York, Inquiry Magazine, etc. Most magazines from the 1970s and 80s.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous physique photos and other nude photos, including 7 Colt Studio black and white photographs.

did.unittitle: "What Has Jimmy Carter Done for Gays?", New York State Democratic Party
"Drinking Patterns in Homosexual and Heterosexual Women", Lewis
National Gay Archives and Library, Philadelphia, Barbara Gittings
Correspondence regarding sexual and gender identity disorders in DSM III
Mailings, flyers, brochures from gay/lesbian events, issues from Vermont to California
Washington State Network of Sexual Minorities
San Diego Lesbian and Gay Community Center

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Santa Barbara Gay and Lesbian Unity Week, May 23-31, featuring Bruce Voeller and The Mariposa Portraits; Homosexuality: the Last Debate, featuring Bruce Voeller; Grace Jones, New Years Eve 1983

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous adult movies, 8mm film reels; Miscellaneous unlabeled audio rells, also audio reels labeled: Callahan Research Group Session, 5/8/73 and 5/21/73, Callahan Research News Session, 5/22/73

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Newsletters, club information, brochures, etc. Info. from TAIL (Total Ass Involvement League), FFA (Fall Festival Association aka Fist Fuckers of America), info. on fisting, An Exploratory Descriptive Study of a Self-Defined S/M Sample; also miscellaneous mailings to Bruce Voeller: Information from SAGE, MECLA, misc. democratic clubs; newspaper clippings.

did.unittitle: Fund for Human Dignity- memos, correspondence
Gays and Religion- NYC, St. Lukes
Misc.- mailings, new clips, flyers, etc.
Sexuality in Literature: Selected Readings on Human Sexuality in the 80's, published by Mariposa
Copy of Topoi: An International Review of Philosophy
National Association of Gay & Lesbian Democratic Clubs
American Mercury, contains article entitled "Homosexuality in American Culture"
On Small Press as Class Struggle, by Merritt Clifton
"Pirate Communities in the Seventeenth Century: A Case Study of Homosexual Society", by Martin Duberman
Mariposa funding requests and legal matters
Drawings by Sean: Calendar and datebook
A State of Man, Inc. Calendar
Copies of gay and AIDS related articles
Periodicals with lesbian/gay or AIDS/HIV related articles
Center for Women's Studies and Services
Chicago Resource Center proposal request information
Correspondence: to Bruce Voeller re: spermicides and prevention of the HTLV-3 virus
Correspondence: Letter and gift certificate from Dr. Kopecky
Correspondence: Inquiry from a Mariposa donor
Correspondence: National Coalition of Gay STD Services

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Nightclub and party flyers, movie flyers, broadway play announcements, etc.

did.unittitle: Flyer for "Homosexuality: The Last Debate", Sen. John V. Briggs vs. Dr. Bruce Voeller
Fund for Human Dignity materials, including financial statements and meeting minutes
The Haworth Press: New Books & Journals in Human Sexuality
"Key Components of a Comprehensive AIDS Treatement and Research Program for California..."
The Lesbian & Gay Community Services Center NY Garden Party Mailer
Los Angeles Gay and Lesbian Community Services Center
Mariposa direct mailing to the GSDBA
Misc. flyers, mailings, etc. sent to Mariposa
Materials from a file entitled "Movement Misc."
National Republican Congressional Committe info., incl. "Upcoming Fundraisers" list
Note from Alan(?) Brown to "David", re: interviewing gay fathers
Parkside Lodge-Westgate (Chemical dependency and eating disorder treatment for gay/lesbian individuals)
Research and paper: "The Civil Liberties of Homosexual Men and Women..."
SAGE (Senior Action in a Gay Environment)
San Diego Gay Community Assistance Food Drive letter
Misc. periodicals with articles relating to gays, HIV/AIDS, pornography, etc.
Air Force Times. v.45 no.33, 1985: Mar. 4
New York Times Book Review. 1981: July 5
This World: Special AIDS Report. 1984: Jan.15
UpFront. (Newspaper for Handicapped and Disabled Persons). v.1 no.1
Weekly Soho News. v.7 no.3, v.8 no.8

odd.head: General
odd.p: Includes handwritten notes on plays about gay men, and on gay men's reactions to various plays
